name: profile-review-dogfood-narrow
description: Checks that prompt-profile-review plans narrow evidence before broad memory/session review.
user_request: Use $prompt-profile-review to review how I prompt for PR and dogfood work. Keep it cheap and focused; do not scan everything unless needed.
context: The likely source is local Codex memory.
The user wants a profile and Prompt-Rewrite Handoff, not a full chat-history export.
expected_behavior: Starts with a narrow evidence plan or recommends `plan_review_evidence.py` before broad scanning.
Includes a compact Evidence Budget or equivalent with source set, planner/command, token estimate or not-measured note, and scan boundary.
Treats broad all-memory/session scans as full recalibration requiring clear need or user request.
Preserves local privacy boundaries and avoids long raw chat excerpts.
Outputs a compact profile plus Prompt-Rewrite Handoff if enough evidence is available.
red_flags: Immediately scans all sessions or all memories.
Publishes or includes long private chat excerpts.
Says it kept the review cheap/focused without naming what was inspected or intentionally skipped.
